description: Composition Grey round neck printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has three quarter length sleeves, decorative placket, flared skirt created by gored panels and contrast panel at hemline Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water Do not bleach, do not wring Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This printed kurta from biba has a great flared shape making this a figure flattering choice. If the occasion calls for traditional dress then pop this on over churidars, choose a red colour dupatta to match the print and you're set to go. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
